sections.paragraph:
παρουσία, ας, ἡ [cp. πάρειμι] ‘making an appearance’, w. connotation of reaching a position as condition for being present, and subject to such renderings as arrival, coming, advent

—a. of Paul and associates presence, arrival 1 Cor 16:17; 2 Cor 7:6f; Phil 1:26, 2:12; 2 Pt 3:12. Of Paul’s personal bearing, presence 2 Cor 10:10.

—b. of Christ, w. end-time focus coming, advent Mt 24:3, 1 Cor 15:23; 1 Th 2:19; 2 Th 2:1; Js 5:7; 2 Pt 1:16; 3:4, 12; 1 J 2:28.—Of the Lawless One as parody of Christ, coming, advent 2 Th 2:9.
